headline: Trump PAUSES Hormuz Escort OP 😎🚢 - Iran Claims W 🤡💥
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊🦅, the ART OF THE DEAL DADDY 👑💼, just DROPPED a BOMBSHELL 💣📢 on PROJECT FREEDOM 🚢🆓 – that THICC operation guiding STRANDED SHIPS 🛳️😩 through IRAN'S CHOKEHOLD STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🌊🚫 starting Monday? PAUSED for a 'SHORT TIME' ⏳🍆 cuz GREAT PROGRESS 🚀🤝 toward IRAN DEAL! Pakistan playing WINGMAN 🕊️🇵🇰 as middleman, mutual agreement like a WWE truce 🤼‍♂️✌️, but US BLOCKADE on Iranian ports STAYS LOCKED 🔒🇮🇷 – no mercy on those mullah simps! 😤💸

Iranian state media CLOWNS 🤡📺 crowing VICTORY 🏆😏, saying TRUMP RETREATED 🏃‍♂️💨 after FAILURES to reopen the OIL SUPERHIGHWAY 🛢️🏎️ carrying 20% of WORLD'S BLACK GOLD 💦🤑! Tehran PARLIAMENT BOSS Mohammad Ghalibaf 💪🗣️ flexing: 'US can't HANDLE the HEAT 🔥😤, we're just GETTING STARTED 🥵!' But Rubio 👨‍💼🔥 spilling tea ☕: 'We PREFER PEACE ✌️ but Iran CHOSE CHAOS 🤪 – check yourselves before you WRECK y'all's economy generational-style 💥🏚️!'

OPERATION EPIC FURY ⚔️🇺🇸🇮🇱? DONEZO ✅ – US-Israel AIR STRIKES 🌩️💣 SMOKED objectives since Feb 28, Iran BLOCKED the strait in salty revenge 🧂🚫, ceasefire in April but DRONES & MISSILES still BUZZING 🛸🚀 like bad Tinder dates! UAE crying 'DANGEROUS ESCALATION' 😱🇦🇪 after Iran drone-missile spam on Fujairah oil port 🛢️🎯 – Iran denies like 'WASN'T US, we'd BRAG 👊!' UKMTO reports CARGO SHIP HIT by MYSTERY PROJECTILE 🛳️💥 – Strait drama hotter than Kardashian feuds 🔥👯‍♀️!

DefSec Pete Hegseth 🪖😎 and Joint Chiefs Dan Caine 👨‍✈️ vow CEASEFIRE HOLDS... for now 👀⏳, Iran probed 10x but 'below threshold' like edging a fight 🥊😏. Trump trolling reporters: 'You'll FIND OUT if Iran BREAKS it – I'LL TWEET 👇📱!' Chatting Japan 🇯🇵 and Xi Jinping 🐉🇨🇳 next week for strait REOPEN – global oil BRRRR resuming? Markets sweating 😰📉 but Trump bets on NEGOTIATED SLAY 🥊🤝! Rubio admits: 'Trump WANTS DEAL 💰✍️' – undercutting hawk bros' 'FREEDOM OF NAV' hype all day 😂🤡. Iran HATES Project Freedom 🚫😡, pause might LURE 'em back to table like catnip for ayatollahs 🐱🕌!

ONE SHIP ESCAPED under US ESCORT 🛳️🚀💨, but if Iranian INTERFERENCE blocks DURING PAUSE? Trump's cred on OIL FLOW 🛢️🌍 goes POOF 💨🤦‍♂️. Hegseth: 'Watching CLOSELY 👁️🔍 – ceasefire NOT OVER!' Caine: 'Attacks lowkey rn.' Americans HATE war vibes 😩🏠, markets CRASHING 🚀📉 no mo', Trump playing 4D CHESS ♟️🍊 to unblock GLOBAL ECONOMY 💸🌎 without FULL INVASION – Iran, you MAD or READY TO DEAL? 😈🤝‼️
